response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery sessions — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack skills in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated ability to build and ship complex systems (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques in resume
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers or mentoring at staff level
8+ years of AI production experience is implied but not clearly documented — most roles are general software engineering
